content.en:
Ye Tian didn't kill this half-step domain ancestor, there was no need.

His gaze was fixed on the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, and he asked, "Where is the Vast Sea Ancestor?"

"I don't know!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord bites himself to death and doesn't know.

He won't betray the Mighty Sea Ancestor, and besides, he really doesn't know where the Mighty Sea Ancestor is!

He only knew that the Vast Sea Ancestor had entered the place where the Void Sacred Tree was, but he didn't know where the Void Sacred Tree was, so he didn't know.

The Lord of the Thunder Tribulation Palace also said that he didn't know and refused to betray the Vast Sea Ancestor.

"Do you think that if you don't tell me, I don't know?"

Ye Tian instantly used the Five Elements Forbidden to seal the cultivation strength of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.

In the past, he was too lazy to deal with the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master because it was unnecessary, but now that Ouyang Jiu'er had asked for him, he naturally wanted to help.

Besides, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master had attacked him at the beginning, and their relationship with each other was not good.

If it weren't for the fact that they had fought side by side with each other in the past and resisted the Devouring Clan together, he would have destroyed the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master long ago.

This time, he didn't bother to kill these two.

However, he must know the whereabouts of the Vast Sea Ancestor.

With the means of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, there was no way to get any information from the soul of the half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, but the battle gate had a lot of secret techniques.

Immediately, Ye Tian performed a secret technique of the Battle Gate on the Dragon Shadow Palace Master—the Soul Chasing Technique!

This kind of secret art can track some kind of memory in other people's souls, lock the memory for exploration, and you can easily get the information you want, unless the other party blows up the soul, there is no way to stop this secret art.

Rumble!!!!

The soul chasing technique was cast, and Ye Tian easily found the information he wanted.

He also probed the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master and confirmed that the information was correct.

"Void Holy Tree, Void Holy Fruit, Stone Tablet, I didn't expect the truth to be like this!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

Obviously, the Vast Sea Ancestor was no longer in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but had gone to the space where the Void Sacred Tree was located.

However, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master didn't know where the Vast Sea Ancestor was, they only knew where the other party had gone.

How do I find the Void Sacred Tree?

Ye Tian said that he didn't know, but Zhanmen didn't necessarily know.

......

"He's gone!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master breathed a sigh of relief.

And the half-step domain ancestor who betrayed the Heavenly Emperor Palace had already fled, and now he didn't know where to go.

"Hunting down the Lord of Qingshui Palace, you dare to betray the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord gave the order.

War Tower.

Ye Tian returned here and entered the War Realm to find information about the Void Sacred Tree.

Soon, he found detailed information about the Void Sacred Tree.

The Void Holy Tree can give birth to the Void Holy Fruit, condense the Void Holy Body, and it is also one of the nearly extinct Holy Trees, and once the Void Holy Fruit is refined, it can directly condense into the Void Holy Body, and there is no need to cultivate any Void Holy Body inheritance.

This kind of Void Holy Fruit is very rare, but in fact, as long as it cooperates with the Void Fruit, you can cultivate the Void Holy Body inheritance and condense the Void Holy Body.

Although the Void Fruit is also rare, it is not extinct, but it is still not a treasure that ordinary people can get, and the Void Holy Body inheritance is also extremely precious.

The Void Sacred Tree is almost extinct, and only one Void Sacred Fruit can be born.

Once the Void Holy Fruit is refined, the potential will increase a lot, and he will definitely be able to become the Strongest Domain Ancestor in the future, and there is even a glimmer of hope to be promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, you can imagine how high the value of the Void Holy Fruit is.

If it appears in the Dark Sacred Domain, I don't know how many top domain ancestors, or even the strongest domain ancestors, are fighting for it.

The above account is similar to what he knew from the soul of the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord.

But what Ye Tian was looking for was to find the Void Sacred Tree like this, not the introduction above.

"There is no record of how to find the Void Sacred Tree?"

Ye Tian also knew that the information recorded in the Library Pavilion of this War Domain Realm was only a small part, and the real War Gate Library Pavilion had endless books.

Immediately, Ye Tian used his identity as the First Holy Son to apply for the mobilization of all the information about the Void Sacred Tree to him.

He still has this right.

So, it didn't take long for all the information about the Void Sacred Tree to be delivered to him.

And this information is very comprehensive, and there are also ways to cultivate the Void Sacred Tree, and even find the Void Sacred Tree.

"Use the power of the Spatial Holy Technique to spy on the void and sense the fluctuations of the Void Holy Tree, before the Void Holy Fruit is about to ripen, you can sense it in advance, the longer it is from the Void Holy Fruit to ripen, the lower the probability of perception!"

Looking at this record, Ye Tian smiled.

Space Holy Technique, he will!

"The Vast Sea Ancestor must be waiting for the Void Holy Fruit to ripen, I just need to wait for the Void Holy Fruit to ripen soon, use the Space Sacred Technique to perceive, and then enter there. At that time, the Void Holy Fruit was not yet fully ripe, and it was impossible for the Vast Sea Ancestor to pick it. Once I enter, there is no hope for the Vast Sea Ancestor, and the Void Holy Fruit will definitely belong to me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was going to give the Void Fruit to his wife, replacing her with her previous Holy Body.

The lifelong efforts of the ancestors of the vast sea will eventually fail.

"Fortunately, there is information about the Battle Gate, otherwise I don't know how to use the Spatial Sacred Technique to perceive, and I will definitely not perceive it when the time comes, so I won't be able to enter the Void Sacred Tree in advance. In that case, once the Void Holy Fruit ripened, the Vast Sea Ancestor was afraid that he would swallow it as soon as possible. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left the Battle Realm Tower and returned to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

After coming back, he sensed it with the Spatial Sacred Technique, Void Slash, but he didn't perceive anything.

Obviously.

The Void Holy Fruit is still very early to ripen, and it is not yet time.

So, Ye Tian continued to retreat and cultivate, and told Ouyang Jiu'er that the Haohai Sea Ancestor was hiding in a mysterious place, and he couldn't find it at the moment, and when he came out, he would capture the Haohai Sea Ancestor.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate, and from time to time he used the Spatial Sacred Technique to perceive the Void Sacred Tree.

One day, hundreds of thousands of years later, the powerhouses of the Black Wind Mountain returned from the Divine Heaven Realm across the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Rumble!!!!!

A black mountain tore through the void and descended on the Dao Mountain Realm.

For the first time, the main clone of the Wind Mountain Mountain took a group of half-step domain ancestors to welcome the arrival of many powerhouses in the Black Wind Mountain.

But Ye Tian did not appear, and was still in retreat.

But the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain informed Ye Tian, but he did not ask Ye Tian to come.

After all, with Ye Tian's current strength and status, the Black Wind Mountain Lord is not as good as Ye Tian's status, Ye Tian is now the Holy Son of the Holy Gate, how can it be compared to the Black Wind Mountain!

In the future, if Black Wind Mountain wants to enter the Dark Sacred Domain, I'm afraid it will have to hug Ye Tian's thigh!
